name: Fettuccine with Shellfish, Tomatoes and Olive
recipeIngredient: 3/4 pound Medium uncooked shrimp, peeled, deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 4 tablespoons olive oil in a heavy skillet over high heat.
2. Add the chopped tomatoes, capers, anchovies, and garlic to the skillet. Cook until the tomatoes release their juices and the mixture thickens, stirring occasionally for about 10 minutes.
3. Add the shrimp and sea scallops to the skillet. Sauté just until cooked through, about 2 minutes.
4. Mix in the chopped Kalamata olives.
5. Meanwhile, cook the fettuccine in a large pot of boiling salted water until it is just tender but still firm enough to bite, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking. Drain the pasta and transfer it to a bowl.
6. Toss the drained pasta with the remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil.
7. Add the cooked pasta to the seafood mixture and toss gently to heat through.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Divide among plates and serve.
